# Architecture & I/O

## 1. Pipeline Workflow
아래는 파이프라인의 전체 실행 흐름도입니다.

<style>
  .diagram-thumbnail { cursor: zoom-in; border: 1px solid #e3e6f0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; background-color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); position: relative; transition: all 0.3s ease; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
  .diagram-thumbnail:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }
  .diagram-thumbnail::before { content: "🔍 Click to Enlarge"; position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 15px; font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: bold; color: #666; background: #f8f9fa; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #ddd; z-index: 10; }
</style>

::: {id="mermaid-lightbox" .diagram-thumbnail}
```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    classDef default fill:#ffffff,stroke:#888,stroke-width:2px,color:#000,rx:5px,ry:5px,padding:15px;
    classDef proc fill:#e6e6e6,stroke:#999,stroke-width:1px,color:#000,rx:5px,ry:5px,padding:15px;
    linkStyle default stroke:#757575,stroke-width:2px;

    subgraph part1["Pre-processing"]
        direction TB
        fastqc["<b>Rawdata Quality Control</b><br/>(fastqc)"]
        fastp["<b>Trim adpater and remove low qual reads</b><br/>(fastp)"]
    end
    subgraph part2["Alignment and BAM Processing"]
        direction TB
        bwa_align["<b>Mapping</b><br/>(bwa_align)"]
        sort_and_index["<b>Sort and index</b><br/>(sort_and_index)"]
        gatk_dedup["<b>Remove duplicates</b><br/>(gatk_dedup)"]
        gatk_realign["<b>Realign</b><br/>(gatk_realign)"]
        gatk_bqsr["<b>Base Quality Score Recalibration</b><br/>(gatk_bqsr)"]
        samtools_filtering["<b>Remove low qualtiy read</b><br/>(samtools_filtering)"]
    end
    subgraph part3["Analysis"]
        direction TB
        copykit["<b>Calculate CNV</b><br/>(copykit)"]
    end
    subgraph part4["QC"]
        direction TB
        gatk_qc_artifacts["<b>Artifacts</b><br/>(gatk_qc_artifacts)"]
        picard_qc_insert_size["<b>Insert Size</b><br/>(picard_qc_insert_size)"]
        gatk_qc_alignment_summary["<b>Alignment Summary</b><br/>(gatk_qc_alignment_summary)"]
        gatk_qc_wgs_metrics["<b>WGS Metrics</b><br/>(gatk_qc_wgs_metrics)"]
        mosdepth_coverage["<b>Coverage</b><br/>(mosdepth_coverage)"]
    end

    data_fastq["Fastq"] --> fastqc
    data_fastq --> fastp
    fastp --> data_trimmed["Trimmed Fastq"]
    data_trimmed --> bwa_align
    bwa_align --> sort_and_index
    sort_and_index --> gatk_dedup
    gatk_dedup --> gatk_realign
    gatk_realign --> gatk_bqsr
    gatk_bqsr --> samtools_filtering
    samtools_filtering --> data_analysis_bam1["Analysis Bam"]
    data_analysis_bam1 --> copykit
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_artifacts
    data_analysis_bam1 --> picard_qc_insert_size
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_alignment_summary
    data_analysis_bam1 --> gatk_qc_wgs_metrics
    data_analysis_bam1 --> mosdepth_coverage

        class fastqc proc;
        class fastp proc;
    style part1 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
        class bwa_align proc;
        class sort_and_index proc;
        class gatk_dedup proc;
        class gatk_realign proc;
        class gatk_bqsr proc;
        class samtools_filtering proc;
    style part2 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
        class copykit proc;
    style part3 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
        class gatk_qc_artifacts proc;
        class picard_qc_insert_size proc;
        class gatk_qc_alignment_summary proc;
        class gatk_qc_wgs_metrics proc;
        class mosdepth_coverage proc;
    style part4 fill:none,stroke:#b0bec5,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5;
```
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    const wrapper = document.getElementById('mermaid-lightbox');
    if (!wrapper) return;

    wrapper.addEventListener('click', function() {
        let overlay = document.getElementById('mermaid-fullscreen-overlay');
        if (!overlay) {
            overlay = document.createElement('div');
            overlay.id = 'mermaid-fullscreen-overlay';
            overlay.style.cssText = 'position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.98); z-index: 99999; overflow: auto; cursor: zoom-out; text-align: center; padding: 60px 20px; box-sizing: border-box; display: block;';
            
            const closeBtn = document.createElement('div');
            closeBtn.innerText = '✖ Close';
            closeBtn.style.cssText = 'position: fixed; top: 20px; right: 30px; background: #333; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: bold; z-index: 100000; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); pointer-events: none;';
            overlay.appendChild(closeBtn);
            
            const content = document.createElement('div');
            content.id = 'mermaid-fullscreen-content';
            content.style.cssText = 'display: inline-block; min-width: 1200px; width: auto; max-width: none; background: #fff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);';
            overlay.appendChild(content);
            
            overlay.addEventListener('click', function() {
                overlay.style.display = 'none';
            });
            
            document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        }
        
        const svgElement = wrapper.querySelector('svg'); 
        if (svgElement) {
            const content = document.getElementById('mermaid-fullscreen-content');
            content.innerHTML = ''; 
            
            const clonedSvg = svgElement.cloneNode(true);
            clonedSvg.removeAttribute('width');
            clonedSvg.removeAttribute('height');
            clonedSvg.style.width = '100%'; 
            clonedSvg.style.height = 'auto';
            clonedSvg.style.maxWidth = 'none';
            clonedSvg.style.overflow = 'visible';
            
            content.appendChild(clonedSvg);
            overlay.style.display = 'block';
        }
    });
});
</script>

<br><br>

## 2. Repository Structure
파이프라인의 핵심 코드 및 테스트 환경 디렉토리 구조입니다.

<div class="card shadow-sm mb-4">
<div class="card-header bg-light">
<strong>📁 Source Directory</strong> (<code>/storage/home/jhkim/scripts/bioscript/pipeline/cbNIPT/v3.0.0</code>)
</div>
<div class="card-body" style="max-height: 350px; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: auto; padding: 15px; background-color: #f8f9fa;">
<pre style="margin: 0; font-size: 0.85em; background: transparent; border: none;"><code>📂 manual
📄 run_pipeline.py
📂 scripts
  📄 run_bwa_picard_pe_align_merge.py
  📄 run_copykit_cbnipt_copynumber_analysis.py
  📄 run_fastp_picoplexgold_pe_trim_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_fastqc_singularity_pe_qc_extract.py
  📄 run_gatk3_indel_realign_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_bqsr_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_dedup_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_alignment_summary_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_artifacts_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_insert_size_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_gatk4_qc_wgs_metrics_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_mosdepth_singularity_coverage.py
  📄 run_multiqc_report_using_singularity.py
  📄 run_samtools_bam_sort_index.py
  📄 run_samtools_filter_bam.py
  📄 temp.py
📂 src
  📄 bio_script.egg-info
    📂 PKG-INFO
    📄 SOURCES.txt
    📄 dependency_links.txt
    📄 entry_points.txt
    📄 requires.txt
    📄 top_level.txt
  📂 bioscript
    📄 __init__.py
    📄 cli.py
    📂 core
      📄 executor.py
      📄 flags.py
      📄 pipeline.py
    📂 generator
      📄 factory.py
      📂 templates
        📄 bash.template.sh
        📄 nextflow.template.nf
        📄 python.template.py
        📄 snakemake.template.smk
      📄 writers.py
    📂 utils</code></pre>
</div>
</div>
